args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
       ST_XMin(env) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(env) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(env) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(env) AS ymax
FROM (
  SELECT kommunenummer, ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade, 25833)) AS env
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
) t;
